subcodes.first_line: O ye who are tested in the love of God! God, the Most High, hath revealed in the Great Qur'án: "Do men suppose that..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الممتحنون فی محبه الله قال الله تعالی فی القرآن العظیم الم احسب الناس ان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
